comment: The new healthcare policy is a great step forward.
I disagree with clause 3, it lacks proper funding.
The environment initiative is okay, but could be more ambitious.
This is a terrible idea and will hurt small businesses.
Fantastic work on the education reform!
I'm neutral about the new transport plan.
The tax changes are very worrying for middle-income families.
I love the emphasis on renewable energy in this proposal.
The digitalization of government services is long overdue.
I'm not sure how this will be implemented in rural areas.
